revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:飛鳥京, en:Asuka, Yamato, simple:Asuka, Yamato); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>波斯波莉斯]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Asuka%2C_Yamato here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Asuka%2C_Yamato for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/5135418 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:飛鳥京 | revid=5135418 --> よく分からない期間の限定 (推古期と文武期に限定したかった?) や「都の総称」というこれもまたよく分からない表現 (都が複数のようにとれる) はあんまりだと思ったので、とりあえずではありますが、全面的に書きかえました。後者については[http://dictionary.goo.ne.jp/search.php?MT=%C8%F4%C4%BB&kind=jn&mode=0&base=11&row=7 大辞林]あたりからのパクリという気もします (8文字分で著作権に関わるかどうかは知りませんが)。
そもそも「はっきりしないもの」として執筆を避けていた題材なこともあり、やはりはっきりしない記事になってしまったと思います。スタブのままにしておきます。 [[User:219.2.18.25|219.2.18.25]] 2006年4月1日 (土) 13:54 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1205381202 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Asuka, Yamato | revid=1205381202 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|royalty=y|history=y}} {{WikiProject Death|importance=mid}} {{WikiProject Archaeology|importance=low}} {{WikiProject Women's History|importance=mid}} }}
== Older capitals? ==
Am I missing something, or wouldn't [[wikisource:The Great Events by Famous Historians/Volume 1/Prince Jimmu Founds Japan's Capital|Kashiwabara]] qualify for an even older capital? Or is it disqualified for being potentially mythological?--[[User:Amelia-the-comic-geek|Amelia-the-comic-geek]] ([[User talk:Amelia-the-comic-geek|talk]]) 05:26, 23 March 2021 (UTC) : Nevermind(?), I checked the [[Capital of Japan]] page and found that it was listed there as a legendary capital. Guess that answers my question.--[[User:Amelia-the-comic-geek|Amelia-the-comic-geek]] ([[User talk:Amelia-the-comic-geek|talk]]) 05:28, 23 March 2021 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/6344772 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: simple:Talk:Asuka, Yamato | revid=6344772 --> {{translated page|en|Asuka, Yamato|version=462286049}}
